title: Connected Glass Blocks
description: Make glass much cleaner by making them connected!
body:
✨Connected Glass Blocks – Clean, Borderless Transparency

Tired of those ugly lines ruining your glass builds? This resource pack fixes that.

Connected Glass Blocks removes the outer borders from glass blocks and makes them fully connected, giving you a smooth, unified look. No more visual breaks. No more grid lines. Just clean, modern transparency.

🔹 Fully connected glass textures
🔹 Removes distracting borders
🔹 Perfect for modern and minimalist builds
🔹 Lightweight and performance-friendly
🔹 Keeps the vanilla feel intact

Your glass walls will finally look like one solid pane instead of a cracked window from 2011.

Small change. Massive visual upgrade.
